bizKimiz.metaDescription: NOVVES brings air movement together with engineering. End-to-end solutions in smoke extraction and comfort ventilation.
bizKimiz.heroDesc: With 20 years of industry experience and our own production capability, we are Turkey's leading brand in industrial fan systems.
bizKimiz.introP1: Founded with 20 years of industry experience by Zeki Kadir Özüntürk and Erdal Özüntürk, NOVVES offers a wide range of services in smoke extraction and comfort ventilation, from manufacturing to project design, from engineering to commissioning.
bizKimiz.introP2: With domestic production at our factory in Yalova, we export from Turkey to more than 50 countries. Every product is designed and certified to meet international testing standards.
bizKimiz.approachP1: NOVVES doesn't just sell the fan systems it develops; it also provides these systems as an end-to-end service within the scope of turnkey projects.
bizKimiz.approachP2: Our company, which has completed numerous successful projects in Turkey and surrounding regions, provides holistic support to business partners through project-specific engineering, CFD analyses, testing and on-site commissioning services.
bizKimiz.areasDesc: We are Turkey's leading solution partner in two core engineering disciplines.
bizKimiz.comfortDesc: A large part of modern life is spent indoors. NOVVES creates healthy and livable environments by ensuring fresh air circulation in buildings with its systems focused on improving indoor air quality. With our wide product range and engineering support, we offer customized solutions for all comfort ventilation needs.
bizKimiz.smokeDesc: In a fire, the first threat is not flames but smoke. NOVVES evacuates smoke quickly and in a controlled manner with jet fan systems developed for parking garages and enclosed spaces. It enables safe evacuation with CFD analyses, smoke control project design and implementation support.
bizKimiz.whyDesc: Our core values and commitments that set us apart from our competitors.

reasons.title: 100% Engineering and Manufacturing Power
reasons.desc: We fully meet quality standards with our production processes carried out in our own facility.

reasons.title: Project-Specific Solution Approach
reasons.desc: Knowing that each project has unique requirements, we produce non-standard engineering solutions.

reasons.title: Compliance with International Standards
reasons.desc: With our CE certified products and ISO certificates, we confidently compete in the global market.

reasons.title: R&D and Energy Efficiency
reasons.desc: We develop low energy consumption, high performance systems by prioritizing sustainability.

reasons.title: Long-Term Business Partnership
reasons.desc: We continue to stand by our business partners with our after-sales technical service and consulting services.

bizKimiz.ctaDesc: Let's determine the right ventilation solution for your project together. Our expert engineering team will get back to you as soon as possible.

ceoMesaji.metaDescription: Message from Novves Chairman and CEO Zeki Kadir Özüntürk.
ceoMesaji.heroDesc: Zeki Kadir Özüntürk's vision and the story of NOVVES.
ceoMesaji.messageP1: Welcome to the NOVVES family, we are delighted to see you here.
ceoMesaji.messageP2: Since our founding, we have been developing innovative jet fan and smoke extraction solutions in the field of industrial and comfort ventilation; particularly in parking garages, facilities and building systems. In every project, we apply engineering discipline at the highest level by prioritizing people's safety and comfort.
ceoMesaji.messageP3: Thanks to our R&D-focused approach and strong production infrastructure, we carry out project analysis, CFD simulations, testing and commissioning processes flawlessly, ensuring that our products meticulously achieve safety, performance and environmental sustainability goals.
ceoMesaji.messageP4: In this company that we built together with my brother Erdal Özüntürk, today we offer expert solutions tailored to each project with a product range exceeding 1,200. The projects we have completed across Turkey and in over 50 countries are the strongest proof of our quality and reliability.
ceoMesaji.pullQuote: For us, quality is not a coincidence but the natural result of a systematic process.
ceoMesaji.messageP5: In the future, we aim to further strengthen our leadership in the global market with our production philosophy that is sensitive to technology, occupational safety and the environment. Our journey to make NOVVES a world brand continues with determination through sustainable energy efficiency, digital engineering tools and our expanding export network.
ceoMesaji.messageP6: You can examine our products in detail through our website and easily submit technical support requests for your projects. Our team will always be happy to work with you.
ceoMesaji.signOff: Thank you for your interest and trust.

ekibimiz.metaDescription: The dynamic NOVVES Team delivers life-saving systems, breath-giving solutions and trust-inspiring engineering.
ekibimiz.heroDesc: The dynamic NOVVES Team doesn't just produce fans. It delivers life-saving systems, breath-giving solutions and trust-inspiring engineering.
ekibimiz.ctaDesc: Would you like to be part of the NOVVES family and give your professional career a new direction?

politikamiz.metaDescription: NOVVES Integrated Management Policy — Environment, sustainability, occupational health and safety, quality management.
politikamiz.introP1: As NOVVES Elektrik Motor A.Ş., we operate in full compliance with national and international legislation with our 3,000 m² production facility in Yalova and our head office in Istanbul Kozyatağı.
politikamiz.introP2Before: In the production of industrial and comfort fan systems, continuously improving quality, offering innovative solutions and maintaining customer satisfaction
politikamiz.introP2Bold: at the highest level at all times

sections.title: Environment and Sustainability
items: We use natural resources efficiently and effectively.
We minimize waste and dispose of it without harming the environment.
We prevent all kinds of pollution at the source and carry out environmentally friendly activities.
We continuously improve recycling, reuse and other waste management practices.
We aim to be a pioneer in energy efficiency and sustainable energy use.
We authorize our employees to stop work that could harm the environment when necessary.

sections.title: Occupational Health and Safety
items: We evaluate environmental and occupational risks to establish systems for preventing workplace accidents.
We use safe, sustainable and modern technologies in all our equipment.
We implement training and preventive measures to prevent occupational diseases.
We adopt a proactive approach to anticipate risks and take preventive measures.
We continuously review our occupational health and safety performance and update our goals.

sections.title: Employee Participation and Development
items: We organize regular training to increase the knowledge and competence of all our employees.
We integrate employee representatives into decision-making processes and encourage active participation.
We increase organizational commitment by removing barriers to participation.

sections.title: Performance and Stakeholder Focus
items: We analyze the expectations of relevant parties and plan appropriate actions.
We aim to exceed customer satisfaction beyond expectations.
We continuously improve the effectiveness of the Integrated Management System and measure our system performance.
Together with our suppliers and employees, we lead exemplary practices for the industry.

politikamiz.closingQuote: NOVVES Elektrik Motor A.Ş. sees sustainability, quality and occupational safety as a holistic system; it continues to create value by reflecting its integrated management approach in all its processes.
